# ST Training Progress Tracker

**Program**: Systems Thinking Foundations  
**Version**: v0.4.0  
**Last updated**: *(team lead updates this date when recording completions)*

---

## How to Use This Tracker

**Team leads**: Update the table below when a team member completes an assessment. Record the date, score or evidence, and link to submitted work.

**Team members**: Do not edit the table directly. Submit your quiz score or portfolio evidence to your team lead for recording.

**GitHub Projects board**: A visual Kanban view of this tracker is planned for a follow-up issue (#10). Until then, this Markdown table is the authoritative record.

**Progress rules**:
- L2 requires: L1 quiz ≥ 70%
- L3 requires: L2 pass + ≥ 2 real ST analyses committed to GitHub issues

---

## Progress Table

| Name | Role / Domain | L1 Date | L1 Score | L2 Date | L2 Score | L2 Practicals | L3 Date | L3 Evidence |
|------|--------------|---------|----------|---------|----------|---------------|---------|-------------|
| *(add row)* | | | | | | | | |

**Column guide**:
- **L1 Date**: Date quiz was passed (YYYY-MM-DD)
- **L1 Score**: Percentage (e.g., `80%`)
- **L2 Date**: Date both scenario questions and practicals were accepted (YYYY-MM-DD)
- **L2 Score**: Scenario question percentage (e.g., `75%`)
- **L2 Practicals**: Links to Exercise A (CLD) and Exercise B (ST analysis) — comma separated
- **L3 Date**: Date team lead signed off on the portfolio (YYYY-MM-DD)
- **L3 Evidence**: Link to the portfolio submission (GitHub issue, folder, or comment)

---

## Row Template

Copy this row when adding a new team member:

```markdown
| Name | Role / Domain | | | | | | | |
```

Example completed row:

```markdown
| Imran Y. Patel | Principal / All Domains | 2025-01-15 | 90% | 2025-02-01 | 87% | [CLD](https://github.com/imranypatel/xp-org1/blob/main/docs/models/...) [Analysis](https://github.com/imranypatel/xp-org1/issues/N) | 2025-03-10 | [Portfolio](https://github.com/imranypatel/xp-org1/issues/11) |
```

## Archive

When team members complete the full program (L3), move their row from the Progress Table above to the Archive table below to keep the active tracker clean.

| Name | Role / Domain | L1 Date | L2 Date | L3 Date | L3 Evidence |
|------|--------------|---------|---------|---------|-------------|
| *(archived completions appear here)* | | | | | |
